meta.title: doctore.ar - Technology Solutions for Medical Offices
meta.description: We transform medical office management with smart technology. TurnosMedicos, networks, accounting, and consulting.

hero.title: Your practice,
hero.description: We empower medical offices with smart technology. Appointment management, network infrastructure, accounting, and comprehensive consulting so you can focus on what you do best: caring for your patients.

product.title: TurnosMedicos
product.description: The most complete appointment management system for healthcare professionals. Automate your schedule, reduce no-shows, and improve your patients' experience.

calendar.title: Smart Calendar
calendar.text: Visual appointment management with automatic reminders via WhatsApp and email.

patients.title: Patient Records
patients.text: Digital medical files with complete history and quick access.

reports.title: Reports & Statistics
reports.text: Detailed analysis of your practice to make better decisions.

multiuser.title: Multi-professional
multiuser.text: Ideal for offices with multiple professionals and specialties.

services.subtitle: Our Services
services.title: Comprehensive solutions for your practice
services.description: Beyond software, we offer a complete ecosystem of services to optimize every aspect of your medical practice.

network.title: Network Installation
network.description: Design and implementation of network infrastructure. Secure and reliable connectivity for your office.

accounting.title: Accounting & Management
accounting.description: Specialized accounting services for healthcare professionals. Billing, taxes, and administration.

consulting.title: Consulting
consulting.description: Comprehensive advice to optimize processes, improve profitability, and grow your medical practice.

pricing.subtitle: Pricing
pricing.title: Transparent and accessible plans
pricing.description: Choose the plan that best fits your practice. No hidden costs, no surprises.

about.subtitle: About Us
about.title: Technology with medical purpose
about.text1: At doctore.ar we understand the unique challenges healthcare professionals face. We were born with the mission to simplify medical office management, allowing professionals to focus on what matters most: their patients.
about.text2: Our team combines technology expertise and healthcare sector knowledge to create solutions that truly work.

innovation.title: Continuous Innovation
innovation.text: We constantly update our solutions with the latest technologies.

support.title: Dedicated Support
support.text: Local team that understands your needs and speaks your language.

security.title: Security First
security.text: Data protection compliant with current healthcare regulations.

contact.subtitle: Contact
contact.title: Let's talk about your practice
contact.description: We're ready to help you transform your medical practice management. Contact us and we'll respond promptly.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your practice and how we can help...

footer.description: Comprehensive technology solutions for medical offices. We simplify your management so you can focus on your patients.
